title: MirrorTrace Public-Paste Self-Exposure Scan Input
description: Searches PUBLIC paste indexes for the SELF subject's OWN identifiers. Prohibited scopes are absent from the enum; only self/public_figure are accepted because identifier search is a dual-use technique restricted to those scopes. No paste body is stored; matched emails are carried only as k-anonymity hash prefixes.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Dual-use identifier searches are permitted ONLY for your own footprint (self) or a genuine public figure acting publicly. Other compliant scopes (consented/brand/safety_evidence) intentionally cannot run this actor.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name). Used only for reporting.

self_identifiers.title: Your own identifiers (email / domain / handle)
self_identifiers.description: Identifiers YOU own (or a public figure's publicly-listed ones): email addresses, domains, or usernames. Each is auto-classified. Matched emails are carried only as a k-anonymity SHA-1 prefix + masked hint; the plaintext address is never stored or emitted.

self_emails.title: Your own email addresses
self_emails.description: Optional explicit email list (merged with self_identifiers). Carried only as a hash prefix + masked hint.

self_domains.title: Your own domains
self_domains.description: Optional explicit domain list (merged with self_identifiers), e.g. your personal site's domain.

self_handles.title: Your own usernames / handles
self_handles.description: Optional explicit handle list (merged with self_identifiers), e.g. usernames you use publicly.

max_pastes_per_identifier.title: Max pastes per identifier
max_pastes_per_identifier.description: Cap on how many public paste hits to record per identifier (politeness / cost bound).
